channel.title: Farika Atkins Blog
channel.description: English education leadership insights from Farika Atkins.

item.title: Building curriculum coherence across IMYC, IGCSE, and IBDP English
item.description: Farika Atkins explains how schools can build curriculum coherence across IMYC, IGCSE, and IBDP English.

item.title: What inclusive English teaching looks like for neurodivergent learners
item.description: Practical strategies for inclusive English teaching that support neurodivergent learners without lowering challenge.

item.title: Teacher coaching that improves writing instruction in secondary school
item.description: A practical coaching model for school leaders who want to improve writing instruction in secondary English classrooms.
